calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-06-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Appearances: Rosario C. Quinton, petitioner in pro per, is sworn and examined. The Court grants the petition for change of name to Rosario C. Castillo. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: R.Goulding; Reporter B Yee CSR# 2647
